channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Chinese Embassy rejects allegations of Filipino espionage linked to China
item.description: The Chinese Embassy in Manila has officially denied any involvement of Beijing in alleged espionage activities involving Filipinos, following reports from the National Security Council (NSC). Spokespe...

item.title: Federal Government Approves Reconstruction of Carter Bridge in Lagos
item.description: President Bola Tinubu don approve say dem go demolish and rebuild Carter Bridge wey dey Lagos, one of di oldest bridges wey dey connect Lagos Island to di mainland. Di decision come after Federal Exec...

item.title: Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth tells Latin American leaders Americas must defend Western and Christian identity against migration and other threats
item.description: U.S. Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth addressed defence leaders from Latin American countries at the inaugural Americas Counter Cartel Conference held in Doral, Florida, on March 5, 2026. In his remarks...

item.title: US States File Lawsuit Against Trump’s New 10% Global Tariffs
item.description: A coalition of 24 US states, mostly led by Democrats, has announced plans to sue President Donald Trump’s administration over his recently imposed 10% global tariffs. The states, including New York, C...

item.title: Tanzania Showcases Wildlife and Culture at ITB Berlin 2026
item.description: Tanzania imeendelea kuvutia sana katika maonyesho ya ITB Berlin 2026, ukiwa na pabelloni yake inayoonyesha vivutio vya kipekee vya nchi hiyo. Tukio hilo rasmi linaanza Machi 7 hadi Machi 11, 2026, na ...

item.title: Black Opal Stakes Day set to attract young crowds with entertainment and drone coverage
item.description: Canberra's Thoroughbred Park is seeing a surge in attendance from younger punters, despite nationwide campaigns against horse racing and concerns over animal welfare. Data shows that 70% of tickets fo...

item.title: DPM Ishaq Dar Briefs Senate on Pakistan's Diplomatic Efforts Amid Iran Conflict and Nuclear Talks
item.description: Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar addressed the Senate on Tuesday, highlighting Pakistan's active diplomatic role following recent attacks on Iran by Israel and the United States. H...

item.title: IAF launches search operation after Su-30 MKI fighter aircraft loses contact shortly after take-off from Jorhat
item.description: An Indian Air Force (IAF) Sukhoi-30 MKI fighter aircraft lost radar contact on Thursday evening shortly after taking off from the airbase in Jorhat, Assam, prompting authorities to launch a search and...

item.title: Nema Halts Coptic Hospital Construction Due to Night-Time Noise Complaints
item.description: The National Environment Management Authority (Nema) has issued a stop order on construction activities at the Coptic Hospital in Nairobi after residents complained about excessive noise at night. The...

item.title: Videographer Emotional as He Streams Late MP Johana Ng'eno's Funeral
item.description: During the funeral of the late Johana Ng'eno, grief overwhelmed his close team, especially videographer Guru Buvati. Buvati, who had spent years documenting Ng'eno's political activities and public en...

item.title: DILG files graft charges against BFP chief over P14.75M ambulance procurement bribe
item.description: MANILA, Philippines — The Department of the Interior and Local Government (DILG) has filed graft, direct bribery, malversation of public funds, and conspiracy cases against Bureau of Fire Protection (...

item.title: Nida Allam Concedes Narrow Loss to Valerie Foushee in North Carolina Democratic Primary
item.description: Durham County Commissioner Nida Allam conceded the Democratic primary for North Carolina's 4th Congressional District after a closely contested race against incumbent Rep. Valerie Foushee. Allam, 32, ...

item.title: Tanzanian Scientists Karen Zablon and Beatrice Magani Advancing Malaria Control Research
item.description: In Tanzania, dedicated scientists Karen Zablon and Beatrice Magani are making important contributions to the fight against malaria through the Transmission Zero research programme. Karen, an entomolog...

item.title: Union Dicon Salt Plc Updates on Efforts to Resume Operations Amid Unreachable Majority Shareholder and NGX Compliance Grace Period
item.description: Union Dicon Salt Plc don release statement say dem still never fit contact their majority shareholder, Aims Limited, wey get big stake for the company. The salt producer explain say dem don try everyt...

item.title: Western Cape authorities urged to take decisive action against rising gender-based violence
item.description: Civil society groups and political representatives in the Western Cape are calling for urgent and coordinated action to address the persistently high levels of gender-based violence (GBV) in the provi...

item.title: Trump Replaces DHS Chief Kristi Noem with Senator Markwayne Mullin
item.description: US President Donald Trump has announced that Kristi Noem will step down as Homeland Security Secretary at the end of this month. Noem, previously governor of South Dakota, had been a key figure in Tru...

item.title: Trump expresses desire to influence choice of Iran's next leader
item.description: US President Donald Trump has told Axios that he feels it is important for him to personally be involved in the selection of Iran’s next leader following the death of Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Kham...

item.title: Karachi Traffic Police Implement Eid Shopping Traffic Management Plan
item.description: KARACHI: Karachi Traffic Police have introduced a detailed traffic management plan ahead of the Eid shopping rush to avoid congestion in busy markets and main roads. Traffic DIG Syed Pir Muhammad Shah...

item.title: FEC Approves GIS-Enabled Alphanumeric Digital Postcode System to Improve Addressing Nationwide
item.description: The Federal Government of Nigeria, through the Federal Executive Council chaired by President Bola Ahmed Tinubu, has approved a new GIS-enabled alphanumeric digital postcode system. This was announced...

item.title: Public inquiry examines prior assaults and police inaction before Nottingham attacks
item.description: A public inquiry has revealed that Valdo Calocane, who later carried out the Nottingham attacks in June 2023, had previously assaulted his university flatmate, Christopher, in January 2022. During the...
